title: clerodendrum frutectorum
intro: Clerodendrum frutectorum, also known as the Fructus Clerodendri or Clerodendrum Fruit, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum frutectorum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in the treatment of various infections, as well as its potential to help lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum frutectorum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's fruit to make a medicinal extract or powder.
